title: Will Norwegian Cruise Line Stock Rally Further?
text: Nortwegian Cruise Line stock, one of the largest cruise line operators, has fared very well recently, rising by almost 18% over the last month (21 trading days), compared to the broader S&P 500 which has gained about 4% over the same period. The stock also remains up by about 4% over the last week.

title: James Hardiman explains why he's bullish on the cruise lines
text: COVID variants are unlikely to hurt cruise demand moving forward, at least in the U.S., says James Hardiman, who's bullish on the underperforming sector. Hardiman's remarks on CNBC's ‘Power Lunch' Despite a recent rebound, cruise stocks are still down significantly from their highs before the pandemic.

title: Why Norwegian Cruise Line, Royal Caribbean, and Marriott International Were Soaring Today
text: JP Morgan Chase and Delta's earnings reports boosted travel stocks across the board, and Norwegian announced its entry into the world of NFTs.

title: So What's Going On With Norwegian Cruise Line Shares Today?
text: Shares of several companies in the hotels, restaurants and leisure sectors, including Norwegian Cruise Line Holdings Ltd (NYSE: NCLH), are trading higher amid overall market strength as stocks rebound following Tuesday weakness. Investors continue to assess inflation and Fed rate hike outlook.

title: Why the Pandemic Could Once Again Trouble Norwegian Cruise Line
text: While bulls of NCLH stock are eager to see the travel industry normalize, an old enemy may once again be waiting at the docks. The post Why the Pandemic Could Once Again Trouble Norwegian Cruise Line appeared first on InvestorPlace.

title: Three Pieces of Good News for Norwegian Cruise Line Investors

title: Norwegian Cruise Lines Stock Is Doing Well, But for How Long?
text: There's certainly enough reasons to root for NCLH stock to succeed, but sadly there's much less reason to buy it here. The post Norwegian Cruise Lines Stock Is Doing Well, But for How Long?

title: Why Carnival, Royal Caribbean And Norwegian Cruise Line Shares Are Rising Today
text: Carnival Corp (NYSE: CCL) shares are trading higher Tuesday morning after the company announced that last week was its busiest booking week in history. Royal Caribbean Group (NYSE: RCL) and Norwegian Cruise Line Holdings Ltd (NYSE: NCLH) are trading higher in sympathy with Carnival.
